title: Ultimate Backpack
description: Add blocks and items that can hold 240 stacks of items.
body:
Add blocks and items that can hold 240 stacks of items.
Blocks that can hold 240 stacks can be created at the workbench using chests and obsidian; items that can hold 240 stacks (like backpacks) can be created at the workbench using the aforementioned blocks, chests and tools (like diamond swords).
This is useful when your inventory is full with items during your Minecraft journey!
